data.name: AFL 23
data.detailed_description:
IT’S TIME TO FLY!!


FEEL THE ATMOSPHERE.
As the crowd shouts BALL, ride every bump, take every tackle, flying high as acclaimed commentators - Anthony Hudson, Jason Bennett, Kelli Underwood, Garry Lyon and Daniel Harford take you inside the action.

CHASE YOUR DREAMS.
Manage your list, develop draftees into champions, take tactical control on game day, make the right moves and lead your team to premiership glory!

MAKE IT YOUR OWN.
Create and share your own clubs, players, and stadiums with the World-Renowned Academy Tools.

THIS TIME IT IS REAL!
All AFL and AFLW teams have been
meticulously modelled, including photogrammetry captures of over 1200 players, matched with their
individual skills and traits powered by Champion Data

–

THIS TIME IT IS REAL!

data.short_description: AFL 23 - IT'S TIME TO FLY!! Feel the Atmosphere, Chase your dreams and Make it your own - in the most realistic AFL game ever!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel i3 2100 (3.1 GHz) / AMD FX 6300 (3.5 GHz)
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 770 (4 GB) / AMD Radeon R9 270 (4 GB)
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 網路: 寬頻網際網路連線
  • 儲存空間: 70 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Though not required, SSD for storage is recommended.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or Windows 11
  • 處理器: Intel i5 6600K (3.5 GHz) / AMD Ryzen 5 1600X (3.6 GHz)
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1660 Ti (6 GB) / AMD RX 5700XT (8 GB)
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 網路: 寬頻網際網路連線
  • 儲存空間: 70 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Though not required, SSD for storage is recommended.
